content:
📜 Each week now has:
✔ Skill Checks Specific to Weekly Content (Updated Actions List).
✔ Three Unlockable Thematic Items (With Caps).
✔ Prerequisites Before Unlocking (Ensures Progression-Based Gameplay).

Example: Week 1 – Classical Hero’s Journey

📜 Skill Check Actions
✔ “Test of Strength” – Deliver a 1-minute impromptu speech arguing an unpopular opinion.
✔ “Oracle’s Vision” – Successfully predict the thematic outcome of a literary passage before reading it.
✔ “The Hero’s Gambit” – Engage in a live debate with a classmate and let the class determine the winner.

📜 Unlockable Items (3-Tiered & Capped)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 179 (chunk 179/555)
